message:
fix(dashboard): initialize expanded sparklines and use auto-scaling for network

The expanded view sparklines were defined but never initialized, leaving
empty canvases when users clicked Expand. Now all expanded sparklines are
properly initialized and updated alongside their compact counterparts.

The network metric was previously capped at 100 MB/s, causing the sparkline
to flatline on fast networks. Now uses auto-scaling based on the maximum
observed throughput.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
